Official Larissa bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: the official Kalyvi profile supports exact identity/location, pebble/coarse-material shore and seabed with rocks at the edges, asphalt plus passable dirt-road access, unorganized status, and normal first-meter depth. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, water-quality, or live-condition claim was imported.

sourceNotes: Source-backed cleanup 2026-05-29: Visit Thessaly supports Papakosta coast identity in the Larissa beach sequence and mentions parking above the canteen. LarissaPress supports Papakosta identity, sandy terrain, one-kilometer beach, forest setting, road access from Agiokampos toward Sklithro, canteen, parking/camper-van space, and seasonal loungers/umbrellas. No live sea-state claim was added.
